$comment: Input to tools/solve-palette.js. Hand-authored hues per slot; the solver fills in OKLCH lightness to hit AA against paired ink. See docs/notes/2026-05-17-color-strategy.md (Strategy 5).

tier.$comment: Phase 1: targets the existing --cN-light register (recessive chameleon: pale on light canvas, deep on dark — mermaid band pattern). AA against --c-ink-light (chameleon dark/white). Later tiers (primary, chrome) layer on top.

primary.$comment: --c-ink-light resolved per canvas mode. Light=dark ink (#0A1628), dark=white ink (#FFFFFF). Solver targets AA against these.
